zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster於大約1281年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾時，他的父親Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster37歲，母親Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre35歲。他於1297年與Maud de Chaworth在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1327年在英國藍卡爾被列為constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster。他去世於1345年9月22日在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 馮 卡素 維福享年65歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster于大约1281年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾时，他的父亲Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster37岁，母亲Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre35岁。他于1297年与Maud de Chaworth在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1327年在英国藍卡爾被列为constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster。他去世于1345年9月22日在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特 馮 卡素 維福享年65岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster was born about 1281, in Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster, was 37 and his mother, Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre, was 35. He married Maud de Chaworth in 1297, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. In 1327, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster in Lancashire, England. He died on 22 September 1345, in Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster est né environ 1281, à Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Chaworth en 1297, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. En 1327, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 22 septembre 1345, à Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster um 1281 in Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster 37 und seine Mutter Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre 35. Er hat 1297 in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales Maud de Chaworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. 1327, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. September 1345 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster è nato il circa 1281 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Chaworth nel 1297, nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Nel 1327, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster nel Lancashire, England. Morì il 22 settembre 1345, nel Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancasterが約1281年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Edmund 1st Earl of Lancasterは37歳，母Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarreは35歳であった。1297年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーでMaud de Chaworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1327年，47歳の時，イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はconstable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancasterと記録されている。彼は1345年9月22日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスター ス カストル ヴィエウで65歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.lifeSummary: Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster(이)가 대략 1281년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1297년 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 Maud de Chaworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1327년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster이었다. 그는 1345년 9월 22일 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Chaworth em 1297, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Em 1327, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1345, em Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster родился около 1281 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Chaworth в 1297 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. В 1327 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер 22 сентября 1345 г. в местности лисестир т кастл вию, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry of Lancaster 3rd Earl of Lancaster nació aproximadamente 1281, en Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Edmund 1st Earl of Lancaster, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Blanche d’Artois Reine de Navarre, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Maud de Chaworth en 1297, en Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. En 1327, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of lancaster castle and high sheriff of lancaster en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1345, en Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
